name: Quality Overlay
description: Draws clean video quality (4K, 1080p, 720p, 480p, SD) and audio codec (DTS-HD MA 7.1, TrueHD Atmos, DD+ 5.1, AAC 5.1, FLAC, ...) badges onto poster, thumbnail, and backdrop images in memory without modifying the original files. Fully configurable from the admin dashboard.
overview: Overlay video quality and audio codec badges on images.

versions.changelog: See the GitHub releases page for details.
